answer: To allow users to enter data to be sent to a web server for processing and storage, or to be used on the client-side to immediately update the interface in some way.
For an <input> element, the default value is defined using the value attribute. For a <textarea> element, the default value is placed between the opening and closing <textarea> tags.
user_name, user_email, user_message; they are sent to /my-handling-form-page
